name: Stuffed Bean Curd
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon cornstarch, dissolved in 1 T. water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried shrimp with 1 1/2 teaspoons of sherry or water in a bowl. Place on a rack in a pot or steamer and cover. Steam over boiling water for 10 minutes.
2. Finely mince the shrimp, fish filler, and pork. Add half a teaspoon of salt, 1 1/2 teaspoons of sherry (or water), pepper, and water. Stir thoroughly. Set aside.
3. Cut each piece of tofu into 2 triangles. Carefully make an indentation on the cut side. Stuff the meat mixture into the hole.
4. Heat oil in a wok. Brown the tofu in the oil.
5. Pour the soy sauce, 1 1/2 teaspoons of sherry, chicken stock, and 1 teaspoon of salt over the tofu. Cook for 5 minutes. Thicken with dissolved cornstarch.
